HomePage.heroTitle: Hiện đại hóa nhà hàng của bạn với CoOrder
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Nền tảng tất cả trong một, ưu tiên di động cho thực đơn, đơn hàng, đặt bàn, nhân viên và phân tích. Làm hài lòng khách hàng và nâng cao hiệu quả đội ngũ—mọi lúc, mọi nơi.

hero.subheadline: CoOrder empowers small restaurants to manage their entire operation—menus, orders, table bookings, staff, and analytics—entirely from a smartphone or tablet.

cta.subtext: No credit card required. 14-day free trial.

social_proof.trusted_by: Powering Success for Restaurants Like Yours

testimonial1.quote: CoOrder transformed our daily operations. Orders are smoother, staff is happier, and our customers love the QR ordering!

testimonial2.quote: The analytics dashboard is a game-changer. We can now make data-driven decisions that truly impact our bottom line.

features.title: Powerful Features to Accelerate Your Business
features.subtitle: CoOrder is packed with features designed to streamline your operations and delight your customers.

menu_management.title: Intuitive Menu Management
menu_management.description: Easily create, update, and organize your digital menus with photos, descriptions, and pricing. Supports multiple languages.
menu_management.benefit: Update menus in minutes, not hours.

qr_ordering.title: Seamless QR Ordering
qr_ordering.description: Customers scan a QR code at their table to view the menu, place orders, and even pay directly from their smartphone.
qr_ordering.benefit: Increase order accuracy and table turnover.

booking_preordering.title: Advanced Booking & Pre-ordering
booking_preordering.description: Manage table reservations and allow customers to pre-order their meals for a smooth dining experience.
booking_preordering.benefit: Reduce wait times and improve customer flow.

smart_analytics.title: Smart Analytics & Reporting
smart_analytics.description: Gain real-time insights into sales, popular dishes, staff performance, and customer feedback to optimize your business.

staff_management.title: Efficient Staff Management
staff_management.description: Assign roles, manage shifts, and track staff performance with a dedicated mobile app for your team.
staff_management.benefit: Empower your team with mobile tools.

mobile_first.title: True Mobile-First Experience
mobile_first.description: Manage your entire restaurant from any smartphone or tablet. No bulky hardware or complex setups required.

howitworks.title: Get Started in Minutes
howitworks.subtitle: Launch your modern restaurant platform with a few simple steps.

step1.title: Sign Up & Customize
step1.description: Create your account, set up your restaurant profile, and customize your digital menu and branding.

step2.title: Generate QR Codes
step2.description: Print unique QR codes for each table or section. Customers scan to access your menu and order.

step3.title: Start Serving & Growing
step3.description: Receive orders directly on your staff app, manage tables, and watch your business thrive with smart insights.

benefits.title: Real Results for Your Restaurant
benefits.subtitle: CoOrder isn't just software; it's a growth partner. See how we help:
benefits.item2: Save up to 10 hours/week on admin tasks
benefits.item5: Empower Your Staff with Mobile Tools

item1.q: What kind of restaurants is CoOrder for?
item1.a: CoOrder is designed for small to medium-sized restaurants, cafes, bars, and food trucks looking to modernize their operations and improve customer experience.

item2.q: Is it difficult to set up?
item2.a: Not at all! Our intuitive interface and guided setup process allow you to get started in minutes. No technical expertise required.

item3.a: No, CoOrder is mobile-first. You can manage everything from your existing smartphones or tablets. No expensive POS systems needed.

item4.a: We offer comprehensive online support, tutorials, and a dedicated support team ready to assist you with any questions or issues.

cta_section.title: Ready to Transform Your Restaurant?
cta_section.subtitle: Join hundreds of restaurants simplifying their operations and boosting profits with CoOrder.

footer.tagline: Modernizing small restaurants, one order at a time.
